code:
---
accTitle: ProspectPro Application Lifecycle
accDescr: Application and session lifecycle with navigation and error handling
domain: app-source
type: stateDiagram-v2
title: Application Lifecycle
index: ../../mmd-shared/config/index.md
---






%%{init: { 'config': 'docs/mmd-shared/config/mermaid.config.json' } }%%


stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Loading: App start

  state "Main States" as main {
    Loading --> Authenticating: Check auth
    Loading --> Offline: No connection
    Authenticating --> Authenticated: Valid session
    Authenticating --> Unauthenticated: No session
    Unauthenticated --> Authenticating: Login attempt
    Authenticated --> Dashboard: Load data
    Authenticated --> Unauthenticated: Logout
    Dashboard --> Campaign: Open campaign
    Dashboard --> Settings: Open settings
    Campaign --> Processing: Start discovery
    Processing --> Results: Complete
    Results --> Export: Download
    Export --> Results: Done
    Settings --> Dashboard: Saved
    Offline --> Loading: Restored
  }

  state "Error States" as errors {
    NetworkError --> Retry: Auto retry
    ServerError --> ErrorPage: Show error
    ValidationError --> Form: Show validation
    Retry --> Loading: Success
    ErrorPage --> Dashboard: User action
    Form --> Campaign: Fix data
  }

  Dashboard --> NetworkError: Network issue
  Campaign --> ServerError: Server issue
  Processing --> ValidationError: Invalid data

  Authenticated --> [*]: App close
  Unauthenticated --> [*]: App close

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一下ProspectPro这个应用的生命周期状态图。用户从打开应用到关闭的完整流程，包括认证、主功能页面，还有错误处理。我想把主状态和错误状态分开两个区域来画，这样清晰一些。
明白了，分两个区域。我先确认一下入口：应用启动后先到Loading状态，然后分支到Authenticating检查认证，或者如果断网就直接进Offline？
对，Loading到Authenticating是正常流程，到Offline是无网络的情况。然后Authenticating根据结果到Authenticated或者Unauthenticated。Unauthenticated可以重新尝试登录回到Authenticating。
好的，主状态区域我加上：Authenticated之后可以到Dashboard加载数据，或者Logout回到Unauthenticated。Dashboard能打开Campaign和Settings，这两个最后都能回到Dashboard。
Campaign下面还有个Processing状态，开始数据发现，完成后到Results，然后可以Export下载。Export完成后要回到Results。另外Offline网络恢复后要能回到Loading重新加载。
Campaign分支我加好了。现在处理错误状态区域：Dashboard遇到网络问题进NetworkError，Campaign遇到服务器问题进ServerError，Processing数据无效进ValidationError。
NetworkError要支持自动重试，Retry成功的话回到Loading。ServerError要显示ErrorPage，用户确认后回到Dashboard。ValidationError要回到Form让用户修正数据，修正后再回到Campaign。
确认一下：Retry到Loading，ErrorPage到Dashboard，Form到Campaign。还有应用关闭的终态：Authenticated和Unauthenticated都可以直接到[*]结束对吧？
没错，就是这样。整个流程完整了，主状态区域包含认证、Dashboard、Campaign流程和Settings，错误状态区域处理三类错误和对应的恢复路径。
